items.title: Quantum Computing Stocks: Honeywell's Quantinuum Plans IPO
items.description: Honeywell said its‌ quantum computing unit Quantinuum will filing for an IPO, adding to the growing number of quantum computing stocks.

items.title: Amgen Reports MariTide Weight Loss Holds Up With Fewer Doses
items.description: Amgen says its MariTide obesity drug helped patients maintain weight loss for a second year, with good safety and fewer side effects.
